ddt:Target.Name: RSAT4_CSHV_eng_v2_5
ddt:Target.Description:
27/06/2012
v1.0 : Creation by J.NGUYEN@AKKA.EU.
22/08/2012 v1.1 : Function code $28 created for CSHV(by L.ADRI)
08/10/2012 v1.2 : Updates(by L.ADRI)
10/12/2012 v1.3 : Updates(by L.ADRI) (services $21$0C and $21$0D removed)
23/12/2012 v1.4 : Request (DataRead.Identification.RenaultR[x]] ) correctly renamed by L.ADRI
18/02/2015 v2: Updated according to TDRC1 document (by I.Gerea)
24/03/2015 Updated according to TDRC1 document ( by A.Croitoru )
13/05/2015 Updated according to TDRC1 document 1.8 ( by A.Croitoru )
09/02/2016 Removed services: 3B: 80,EF,84 ( by A.Croitoru ) Added SW version 4.20
09/02/2016 Added the applicability of X07ph2 ( by A.Croitoru )

Data.Name: DTCExtendedData.Mileage
Data.Comment: Description of the extendedData Mileage (use by Failure Page to decode data)

Data.Name: Number of memorized fault
Data.Comment: nombre de défauts mémorisés par l'UCE

Data.Name: Number of present fault
Data.Comment: nombre de défauts diagnostiqués présents par l'UCE

Data.Name: Number of clear DTC
Data.Comment: nombre de RAZ des défauts mémorisés

Data.Name: Size to read
Data.Comment: Nombre d'octets à lire pour la lecture mémoire
Data.Description: Le nombre d'octets mémoire (MEMSIZE) à lire doit être compris entre 1 et 25.

Item.Text: Set "Crash detected" in the frame CSHV_01 to 1 and "Crash Detection Out Of Order" signal to 1
Set "Crash detected" in the frame CSHV_01 to 1
Set "Crash Detection Out Of Order" in the frame CSHV_01 to 1

Data.Name: Sensor channel Y acc data sample
Sensor channel X acc data sample
Memorized fault
Data.Comment: pannes diagnostiquées et mémorisées par l'UCE

Data.Name: Low voltage detected in current Power ON Cycle
ControlStatus of Crash Detection Out Of Order

Item.Text: Control of "Crash Detected" complete and OK
Control of "Crash Detected" stopped by ControlOption parameter set to "Stop Control"
Control of "Crash Detected" complete and OK
Control of "Crash Detected" stopped by ControlOption parameter set to "Stop Control"
FM (Frequency Modulated) / PWM (Pulse Width Modulated) Failures
Device and failure type ODB codding
FM (Frequency Modulated) / PWM (Pulse Width Modulated) Failures
circuit short to ground or open
circuit short to battery or open
signal rate of change below threshold
signal rate of change above threshold
signal bias level out of range / zero adjustment failure
signal has too few transitions / events
signal has too many transitions / events
alive / sequence counter incorrect / not updated
value of signal protection calculation incorrect
Component or system operation obstructed or blocked

Data.Name: Calculator has to be changed
Data.Comment: due to an internal error or a crash

Item.Text: calculator has not to be replaced

Data.Name: Output Permanent Control List
Data.Comment: Testing output : List of all output with permanent test

Data.Name: OutputTemporaryControlList
Data.Comment: Testing output : List of all output with temporary test

Item.Text: Control of "Crash Detected" complete and OK - Default return value if control not yet requested
Control of "Crash Detected" stopped by ControlOption parameter set to "Stop Control"

Data.Name: ControlStatus of "Crash Detection Out Of Order"

Item.Text: Control of "Crash Detection Out Of Order" in progress
Control of "Crash Detection Out Of Order" complete and OK - Default return value if control not yet requested
Control of "Crash Detection Out Of Order" stopped by ControlOption parameter set to "Stop Control"

Data.Name: OutputPermanentControlList
Data.Comment: Testing output : List of all output with permanent test

Item.Text: Set "Crash detected" in frame CSHV_01 to 1 and "Crash Detection Out Of Order" signal to 1
Set "Crash detected" in frame CSHV_01 to 1
Set "Crash detection Out of Order" in frame CSHV_01 to 1
Control of "Crash Detected" complete and OK
Control of "Crash Detected" stopped by ControlOption parameter set to "Stop Control"

Request.Name: ReadMemoryByAddress
Request.Comment: Service de lecture mémoire par adressage

Request.Name: TesterPresent.WithResponse
Request.Comment: This request enable P2P tester present for tool (Screen, IOctl, ...)

Request.Name: Reading of ECU state synthesis
Request.Comment: Reading service of main airbag calculator information

DataItem.Name: Low voltage detected in current Power ON Cycle

Request.Name: VIN Reading
Request.Comment: Reading service to know the Vehicle Identification Number

Request.Name: Reading of memorized DTC before crash
Request.Comment: Only available in case of crash

Request.Name: VIN code configuration
Request.Comment: Vehicle Identification Number. Can not be changed after deployment

Request.Name: Reset Crash
Request.Comment: Reset of ECU after deployment or access to the supplier session. This service allows to come back to the initial configuration.

Request.Name: ReadDTCInformation.ReportExtendedData
Request.Comment: Requete non utilisable dans les outils standard de DDT2000

Request.Name: ReadDTCInformation.ReportExtendedData.Mileage
Request.Comment: Request for the import in the Clip

Request.Name: ReadDTCInformation.ReportExtendedData.AgingCounter
Request.Comment: Request for the import in the Clip

Request.Name: ClearDiagnosticInformation.All
Request.Comment: The ClearDiagnosticInformation service is used by the tool to clear diagnostic information in an ECUs memory

Request.Name: DataRead.Identification.RenaultR2
Request.Comment: ReadDataByLocalIdentifier : Use this request if ECU use Coding Renault R2 or 5DIGITS

Request.Name: Reading of sensor data
Request.Comment: Reading service to know the current value of each firing line impedance

DataItem.Name: Sensor channel X acc data sample
Sensor channel Y acc data sample

Request.Name: Reading of ECU state synthesis before first crash
Request.Comment: Reading service of main airbag information before crash. Service only available in case o f crash

DataItem.Name: Low voltage detected in current Power ON Cycle

Request.Name: Traceability info
Request.Comment: Give the serial number for the airbag calculator

Request.Name: ReadDTCInformation.ReportDTC
Request.Comment: DDT2000 Failures page requests / Clip import : Unusable in the standard tools of DDT2000

Request.Name: OutputControl
Request.Comment: Standard definition for DDT2000 automatic testing screen

DataItem.Name: ControlStatus of "Crash Detection Out Of Order"

Display.DataName: Sensor channel X acc data sample
Sensor channel Y acc data sample
Low voltage detected in current Power ON Cycle

Screen.Name: Reading of ECU state synthesis before first crash

Label.Text: Reading of ECU state synthesis before first crash

Button.Text: Reading of ECU state synthesis before first crash

Send.RequestName: Reading of ECU state synthesis before first crash

Display.RequestName: Reading of ECU state synthesis before first crash
Reading of ECU state synthesis before first crash
Reading of ECU state synthesis before first crash
Reading of ECU state synthesis before first crash
Reading of ECU state synthesis before first crash
Reading of ECU state synthesis before first crash
Reading of ECU state synthesis before first crash
